bash -lc '
set +e
run() {
  printf '"'"'\n### COMMAND: %s\n'"'"' "$*"
  "$@"
  rc=$?
  printf '"'"'### EXIT: %s\n'"'"' "$rc"
}
printf '"'"'utc_timestamp='"'"'; date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ
run hostname
run uname -a
printf '"'"'\n### FILE: /etc/os-release\n'"'"'
cat /etc/os-release; printf '"'"'### EXIT: %s\n'"'"' "$?"
run id
printf '"'"'\n### PATH\n%s\n'"'"' "$PATH"
run command -v git
run git --version
printf '"'"'\n### PACKAGE_MANAGER_DETECTION\n'"'"'
for command in apt-get apt dnf yum zypper apk pacman emerge; do command -v "$command" 2>/dev/null || true; done
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run apt-get --version
  printf '"'"'\n### APT_GIT_POLICY\n'"'"'; apt-cache policy git; printf '"'"'### EXIT: %s\n'"'"' "$?"
  printf '"'"'\n### APT_SOURCES\n'"'"'
  find /etc/apt -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name '"'"'*.list'"'"' -o -name '"'"'*.sources'"'"' \) -print -exec sed -n '"'"'1,220p'"'"' {} \; ; printf '"'"'### EXIT: %s\n'"'"' "$?"
  run dpkg-query -W -f='"'"'${Package}\t${Version}\t${Architecture}\t${Status}\n'"'"' git
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run dnf --version
  run dnf repolist --enabled
  run rpm -q git
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run yum --version
  run yum repolist enabled
  run rpm -q git
elif command -v zypper >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run zypper --version
  run zypper repos --uri
  run rpm -q git
elif command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run apk --version
  run apk info -r git
  run apk info git
elif command -v pacman >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  run pacman --version
  run pacman -Q git
fi
run df -B1 /
run df -B1 /root
'
label: target_pre_provisioning_state

argv:
bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail
. /etc/os-release
printf '"'"'detected_id=%s\n'"'"' "${ID:-}"
printf '"'"'detected_id_like=%s\n'"'"' "${ID_LIKE:-}"
printf '"'"'utc_timestamp='"'"'; date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ
family=" ${ID:-} ${ID_LIKE:-} "
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (debian|ubuntu) '"'"'; then
  apt-get update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (fedora|rhel|centos|rocky|almalinux) '"'"'; then
  dnf install -y git
elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (rhel|centos|rocky|almalinux) '"'"'; then
  yum install -y git
elif command -v zypper >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (suse|opensuse) '"'"'; then
  zypper --non-interactive install git
elif command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (alpine) '"'"'; then
  apk add git
elif command -v pacman >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '"'"'%s'"'"' "$family" | grep -Eq '"'"' (arch) '"'"'; then
  pacman --noconfirm -S git
else
  echo '"'"'NO_MATCHING_NATIVE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_FOR_GIT'"'"' >&2
  exit 12
fi
'

argv:
set -euo pipefail
root=/root/catcas_phase6b6_portable_3ebd3ac0
package=$root/extract/phase6b6_portable_target_package
stdout=$root/results/portable-target-result.json
stderr=$root/results/portable-target-result.stderr
meta=$root/results/portable-target-command-meta.txt
cd /root
export PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1
export PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1
start=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
set +e
python3 "$package/portable_target_qualification.py" --package-root "$package" > "$stdout" 2> "$stderr"
rc=$?
set -e
finish=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
{
  printf 'command=python3 %s --package-root %s\n' "$package/portable_target_qualification.py" "$package"
  printf 'environment=PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1\n'
  printf 'working_directory=/root\n'
  printf 'started=%s\n' "$start"
  printf 'finished=%s\n' "$finish"
  printf 'exit_code=%s\n' "$rc"
  printf 'stdout_path=%s\n' "$stdout"
  printf 'stderr_path=%s\n' "$stderr"
  printf 'stdout_bytes='; wc -c < "$stdout"
  printf 'stderr_bytes='; wc -c < "$stderr"
  printf 'stdout_sha256='; sha256sum "$stdout" | awk '{print $1}'
  printf 'stderr_sha256='; sha256sum "$stderr" | awk '{print $1}'
} > "$meta"
cat "$meta"
exit "$rc"
label: target_run_portable_qualification

argv:
set -euo pipefail
root=/root/catcas_phase6b6_portable_3ebd3ac0
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib, sys
root = pathlib.Path('/root/catcas_phase6b6_portable_3ebd3ac0')
result_path = root / 'results/portable-target-result.json'
result = json.loads(result_path.read_text())
checks = {
  'status': result.get('status'),
  'target_executed_git': result.get('target_executed_git'),
  'jsonschema_required': result.get('jsonschema_required'),
  'hardware_ran': result.get('hardware_ran'),
  'scientific_acquisition_authorized': result.get('scientific_acquisition_authorized'),
  'portable_manifest_sha256': result.get('portable_manifest_sha256'),
  'portable_export_commit': result.get('portable_export_commit'),
  'portable_export_tree': result.get('portable_export_tree'),
  'final_result_sha256': result.get('final_result_sha256'),
  'raw_c_emission_sha256': result.get('raw_c_emission_sha256'),
  'sender_process_matches': result.get('sender_process_absence', {}).get('matches'),
}
sv = result['snapshot_verification']
checks.update({
  'observed_inventory_sha256': sv['observed_snapshot_identity']['calculated_inventory_sha256'],
  'calculated_scoped_tree': sv['observed_snapshot_identity']['calculated_scoped_tree'],
  'phase6b6_subtree_inventory_sha256': sv['observed_snapshot_identity']['calculated_phase6b6_subtree_inventory_sha256'],
  'calculated_v2_source_sha256': sv['observed_snapshot_identity']['calculated_v2_source_sha256'],
})
checks.update({
  'equivalence_status': result['equivalence_result']['status'],
  'runtime_status': result['runtime_result']['status'],
  'schedule_digest': result['runtime_result']['schedule_digest'],
  'mock_custody_digest': result['runtime_result']['mock_custody_digest'],
  'hardware_backend_rejected': result['runtime_result']['hardware_backend_rejected'],
  'strict_raw_stdout_sha256': result['strict_result']['raw_stdout_sha256'],
  'asan_raw_stdout_sha256': result['asan_result']['raw_stdout_sha256'],
  'ubsan_raw_stdout_sha256': result['ubsan_result']['raw_stdout_sha256'],
  'strict_stderr_sha256': result['strict_result']['stderr_sha256'],
  'asan_stderr_sha256': result['asan_result']['stderr_sha256'],
  'ubsan_stderr_sha256': result['ubsan_result']['stderr_sha256'],
})
expected = {
  'status': 'PHASE6B6_PORTABLE_TARGET_QUALIFICATION_PASS',
  'target_executed_git': False,
  'jsonschema_required': False,
  'hardware_ran': False,
  'scientific_acquisition_authorized': False,
  'portable_manifest_sha256': '79da3b911bd5c751508a6b68628dd314a29f48f1bc3dd9de41d01ea50a9732c0',
  'portable_export_commit': '3ebd3ac0a3098e29537cab0eaa9650f883b95fd4',
  'portable_export_tree': '4df244b058ea966f9eb0c14f60943e746b4dbd31',
  'observed_inventory_sha256': 'e47dea4c3467835a425d9d553803da48f672a8799970db4fc9b83e98596f50d8',
  'calculated_scoped_tree': '408ee35257417898a992510b0f260602117a15af',
  'phase6b6_subtree_inventory_sha256': '24789f0df9afa2d9f6a243a9050ff8f265cf22ffb42ab33bbe2f67521dbf44b5',
  'calculated_v2_source_sha256': 'c95e90c3344a05d67799f44158036f316da66faf0fd66e47336ae045e8b4c976',
  'equivalence_status': 'V2_REFERENCE_EQUIVALENCE_PASS',
  'runtime_status': 'PHASE6B6_PORTABLE_RUNTIME_VALIDATE_ONLY_OK',
  'schedule_digest': 'c632d59934c2610541e279cac3a48202f2c0a79bb734e995f2cc4f28d19e87d3',
  'mock_custody_digest': '4c0a58772fd25fe77759d6d09089ad532a09b3a5adcdce01dc099b6b7b00dba1',
  'hardware_backend_rejected': True,
  'strict_raw_stdout_sha256': '56a26105b2b6969a05addbaafaa8db672d0d05a50158e1d145ed2903fec889c2',
  'asan_raw_stdout_sha256': '56a26105b2b6969a05addbaafaa8db672d0d05a50158e1d145ed2903fec889c2',
  'ubsan_raw_stdout_sha256': '56a26105b2b6969a05addbaafaa8db672d0d05a50158e1d145ed2903fec889c2',
  'strict_stderr_sha256': 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855',
  'asan_stderr_sha256': 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855',
  'ubsan_stderr_sha256': 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855',
  'sender_process_matches': [],
}
fail = {k: {'actual': checks.get(k), 'expected': v} for k, v in expected.items() if checks.get(k) != v}
out = {'checks': checks, 'failures': fail, 'all_required_checks_pass': not fail}
(root / 'results/target-result-required-field-checks.json').write_text(json.dumps(out, indent=2, sort_keys=True)+'\n')
print(json.dumps(out, indent=2, sort_keys=True))
if fail:
    sys.exit(1)
PY
